Here’s the implementation plan I’m following based on the runtime trace:

1. Replace the starter Storybook setup with a shared app-faithful preview.
   - Import the real root CSS.
   - Wrap all stories with the real `StrictMode` + `LikedArticlesProvider` tree.
   - Seed `localStorage` for `lang` and `likedArticles`.
   - Freeze time with `mockdate`.
   - Initialize global MSW handlers for the Wikipedia requests the app actually makes.

2. Remove the demo stories and add colocated stories for the real app targets.
   - `src/App.stories.tsx`
   - `src/components/WikiCard.stories.tsx`
   - `src/components/LanguageSelector.stories.tsx`
   - I’ll keep the scope to the meaningful app components here rather than padding with scaffold leftovers.

3. Give every named story a real `play` function.
   - App stories will verify mocked data, loading, About, Likes, and search behavior.
   - `WikiCard` stories will verify rendering plus like state and interaction through the real provider.
   - `LanguageSelector` stories will verify the dropdown behavior in the same shell pattern the app uses.

4. Verify the whole setup.
   - Install any missing Storybook test/runtime deps with Bun because this repo uses `bun.lock`.
   - Generate the MSW worker in `public/`.
   - Run Storybook Vitest against each story file and finish with `npx tsc --noEmit`.

I’m moving into dependency/setup edits now.

content.text:
Here’s the implementation plan I’m following based on the runtime trace:

1. Replace the starter Storybook setup with a shared app-faithful preview.
   - Import the real root CSS.
   - Wrap all stories with the real `StrictMode` + `LikedArticlesProvider` tree.
   - Seed `localStorage` for `lang` and `likedArticles`.
   - Freeze time with `mockdate`.
   - Initialize global MSW handlers for the Wikipedia requests the app actually makes.

2. Remove the demo stories and add colocated stories for the real app targets.
   - `src/App.stories.tsx`
   - `src/components/WikiCard.stories.tsx`
   - `src/components/LanguageSelector.stories.tsx`
   - I’ll keep the scope to the meaningful app components here rather than padding with scaffold leftovers.

3. Give every named story a real `play` function.
   - App stories will verify mocked data, loading, About, Likes, and search behavior.
   - `WikiCard` stories will verify rendering plus like state and interaction through the real provider.
   - `LanguageSelector` stories will verify the dropdown behavior in the same shell pattern the app uses.

4. Verify the whole setup.
   - Install any missing Storybook test/runtime deps with Bun because this repo uses `bun.lock`.
   - Generate the MSW worker in `public/`.
   - Run Storybook Vitest against each story file and finish with `npx tsc --noEmit`.

I’m moving into dependency/setup edits now.

Storybook now mirrors the real app runtime without changing app code. The shared setup is in [.storybook/preview.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-05-44Z-069b3e20/project/frontend/.storybook/preview.tsx#L1), where I copied the real `StrictMode` + `LikedArticlesProvider` tree, imported [src/index.css](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-05-44Z-069b3e20/project/frontend/src/index.css), seeded `localStorage` for `lang` and liked articles, froze time with `mockdate`, and wired global MSW loaders. The deterministic Wikipedia/image mocks live in [.storybook/msw-handlers.ts](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-05-44Z-069b3e20/project/frontend/.storybook/msw-handlers.ts#L1) and [.storybook/mock-wiki-data.ts](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-05-44Z-069b3e20/project/frontend/.storybook/mock-wiki-data.ts#L1). I also made Storybook serve `public/` in [.storybook/main.ts](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-05-44Z-069b3e20/project/frontend/.storybook/main.ts#L1), generated [public/mockServiceWorker.js](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-05-44Z-069b3e20/project/frontend/public/mockServiceWorker.js), and expanded [.storybook` typing via `tsconfig.node.json`](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-05-44Z-069b3e20/project/frontend/tsconfig.node.json#L1). I didn’t add `preview-body.html` because this app doesn’t use `createPortal` or custom portal roots.

I replaced the starter demo stories with real app stories in [src/App.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-05-44Z-069b3e20/project/frontend/src/App.stories.tsx#L1), [src/components/WikiCard.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-05-44Z-069b3e20/project/frontend/src/components/WikiCard.stories.tsx#L1), and [src/components/LanguageSelector.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-05-44Z-069b3e20/project/frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector.stories.tsx#L1).
